title: A Critical Evaluation of Background Gene Omission in Imaging Transcriptomics.
author: Cao Z Bao L Qin J Zhan G
content: S-EPMC12398807 PMC12398807 A Critical Evaluation of Background Gene Omission in Imaging Transcriptomics. Imaging transcriptomics integrates spatial gene expression data with imaging-derived phenotypes (IDPs) to elucidate molecular mechanisms that underlie brain structure and function
